finding: The 9 repointed check-subset scripts (lint:colors/settings-field/adjacent-inline/logical-direction/tooltip-placement + check:design-spec/kit-manifest + gen:*) invoke the SDK copies with ziee's explicit paths and emit byte-identical stdout vs the pre-change baseline (each ✓ line diffed clean). lint:guardrails unchanged. ui tsc=0, desktop tsc=0.

Generating DESIGN_SYSTEM.md from ziee's src/index.css with --app-name Ziee (default) diffs byte-identical against the committed file; --check returns 'up to date'. The engine (CSS token parse) is generic; only paths+app-name are parameterized.

parseRoots reads repeatable --root=<dir> resolved vs CWD (default ['src']); the smoke test proves an arbitrary --root dir is scanned (clean .tsx passes exit 0, a bg-blue-500 .tsx fails exit 1). This is the parameterization-over-app-src proof.

The base preset contains NO app-specific import ban (grep: no 'noRestrictedImports', no 'antd', no grit-plugin path). Those stay in ziee's biome.json. Smoke test asserts the base has no noRestrictedImports. Domain-agnostic.
The base tsconfig has NO app 'paths'/'include'/'references' (smoke test asserts no 'paths'); only strict generic compilerOptions. ziee supplies paths/include via extends. Reusable.

git status of BOTH the sdk submodule and the ziee main repo contains zero Rust/emit_ts/openapi.json/api-client-types.ts/migrations paths. Pure config+tooling; the golden types.ts/openapi are untouched by construction (STOP condition not triggered).

Re-pointing at the SDK kit barrel FIXES ziee's pre-existing-broken check:kit-manifest (was exit 1 — stale src/components/ui/index.ts barrel after the kit moved to @ziee/kit). Now --check passes (67 components, up to date). Net improvement, no regression.

exports: ./biome, ./tsconfig, ./syncpack, ./check, ./lint/* + bins ziee-check/ziee-lint-*/ziee-design-spec/ziee-kit-manifest all resolve after npm install (node_modules/.bin symlinks verified). typescript is an OPTIONAL peer (hoisted at root; require('typescript') resolves from the SDK file location).

biome extends the base via a RELATIVE path; verified biome check ./src produces identical counts (Checked 952 / 1299 errors / 123 warnings, exit 1 pre-existing) and lint:guardrails identical (modulo run-ms). The extends merge is a lint-result no-op.
tsconfig extends the base; ui tsc --noEmit exit 0 clean (matches baseline). lib=ES2020 child-override applied; desktop/ui tsconfig left untouched (still exit 0).

icon-action + native-scroll + all gallery/state-matrix/testid checks intentionally NOT touched. icon-action stays because it encodes a curated action-word→glyph map + gallery allowlist (app content). No over-reach into the separate @ziee/gallery extraction.
App name 'ziee' / '@ziee/config' throughout; no 'ziee-chat'. No Claude trailers in the SDK commit message.

4 smoke tests pass: biome/tsconfig base validity + no app-coupling, defineSyncpack composition (catch-all last), and the parameterized-lint clean/violation proof. No #[ignore]/.skip/.only; real behavior asserted.
